title: Java Developer / Java programmētājs/-a | SEB, Riga

summary.lv: SEB meklē Java izstrādātāju Analytics & Reporting komandā (Accounts & Payments domēns), kas strādās ar Java, Spring Boot un Kafka, izmantojot GCP.
summary.en: SEB is hiring a Java Developer in the Analytics & Reporting area (Accounts & Payments domain) to work with Java, Spring Boot and Kafka on GCP.
